question.label: Settling in
question.name: What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Sam?
question.description: Safe opener that lets Sam set context before anything specific is raised.

answer: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.

assessment.note: He can do the tasks but is second-guessing whether his approach matches team expectations, which signals mild uncertainty and low steadiness.

new_queue.label: Team expectations
new_queue.name: When you say 'team expectations,' what part feels hardest to read?

new_queue.label: Done definition
new_queue.name: What does “done” mean to you on your current tickets?

new_queue.label: Handoff gaps
new_queue.name: Where do the handoffs still feel fuzzy?

new_queue.label: Shipping hesitation
new_queue.name: What feels uncertain right before you ship?

new_queue.label: Support cadence
new_queue.name: What kind of check-in from me would help you most over the next two weeks?

new_queue.label: Fastest unblock
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
